calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Maria Musumeci, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appeared to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition were true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court granted the petition for Change of Name to: Mason James Musumeci.
The Court further ordered the gender of Mason James Musumeci was changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.
